long_description:
Coles Irresistible Cookies and Cream Ice Cream 1L


  • Classic cookies and cream ice cream
  • Rainforest Alliance-approved cocoa
  • No artificial colours and flavours


Coles Irresistible Cookies and Cream Ice Cream is a classic crowd-favourite made with crushed dark choc cookie pieces swirled through premium vanilla ice cream. With a good combination of crisp cookie and just the right amount of sweetness, it's the perfect dessert you can enjoy straight from the tub.


Or why not turn Coles Irresistible Cookies and Cream Ice Cream into a decadent milkshake topped with whipped cream and crushed biscuit bits? If you want your milkshake to stay thick for longer, place the glasses in the freezer for 10 minutes before pouring.


Coles Irresistible Cookies and Cream Ice Cream not only tastes great, it's free from artificial colours and flavours.
name: Irresistible Cookies & Cream

long_description:
Refreshing mango sorbet sticks with a sweet mango glaze.
?

  • Made with real mango
  • Australian made
  • Suitable for vegans and vegetarians

?
Coles Mango Sorbet Mini Sticks are made with a refreshing mango sorbet centre with a crisp ice shell. These delicious desserts are the perfect treat for any occasion, especially on hot summer days!
?
Our mango sorbet sticks are plant-based, meaning they are vegan and vegetarian friendly. Partnering with one of our key frozen dessert suppliers, these sweet treats are made in Australia and contain real mango and no artificial colours or flavours.
?
Individually portioned for convenience, this frozen dessert is ready to be enjoyed by the pool, at the beach or on the go. With six in each pack, they are perfect for sharing with family and friends or for your next entertaining occasion, they are sure to be a summer favourite!
?
Serving suggestion: Perfect on its own or with a bowl of summer fruit
name: Mango Sorbet 6pk

long_description:
LET ME MAKE YOUR HEART FLUTTER.
I'll awaken your senses with my simple, yet irresistible, Coffee ice cream. Roasted Brazilian coffee beans are gently combined with my luxurious ice cream to create an intensely creamy sensation. Pure indulgence with a coffee kick.

So, what's my secret?
I don't hold back. Using only quality and carefully selected ingredients, every bite of me is proof that when you start with something simple, extraordinary things can happen.
  • Made with real cream

  • No artificial colours, flavours or preservatives

  • Luxurious ice cream combined with Roasted Brazilian coffee beans.

  • Pure indulgence with a coffee kick.
name: Ice Cream Coffee

description: COLES KITCHEN GRILLED MEDITERRANEAN STYLE VEGETABLES 750G
ingredients: INGREDIENTS: Grilled Eggplant (22%) [Eggplant, Sunflower Oil], Grilled Zucchini (22%), Grilled Yellow Capsicum (19%), Grilled Red Capsicum (19%), Grilled Onion (12%), Fried Onion (3.0%) [Onion, Sunflower Oil], Olive Oil, Basil, Salt, Garlic Powder, White Pepper, Canola Oil.
long_description:
Coles Kitchen Grilled Mediterranean Style Vegetables 750g


  • Mix of eggplant, zucchini, capsicum and onion
  • Lightly seasoned
  • Ready in 6 minutes


From our kitchen to yours. Coles Kitchen Grilled Mediterranean Style Vegetables combine a delicious mix of carefully selected veggies that are lightly seasoned and grilled to perfection.


Coles Kitchen Grilled Mediterranean Style Vegetables are a convenient way to serve up delicious healthy vegetables all year round. This vibrant blend of grilled eggplant, zucchini, yellow and red capsicum and onion is tossed in olive oil, basil, garlic and pepper for a Mediterranean style dish that's great for any meal.


Try Coles Kitchen Grilled Mediterranean Style Vegetables as a tasty accompaniment to a main course and fish, chicken or lamb are all classic choices. Or fold into a soft wrap with some crumbly feta cheese and roasted pine nuts for a quick and flavourful lunch. They're also great with rice or served with crusty sourdough bread and a green salad as a simple vegetarian option.
name: Grilled Mediterranean Style Vegetables

long_description:
I may be a gorgeous ice cream but it's what's inside that counts. Only the most exceptional strawberries are handpicked at just the right moment and then gently folded into my lusciously creamy base making me blush naturally pink and sumptuously sweet. So what's my secret? I don't hold back. My ice cream uses only quality and carefully selected ingredients, every bite of me is proof that when you start with something simple, extraordinary things can happen.

Hagen-Dazs - The ice cream of ice creams

  • Strawberry ice cream with strawberries

  • Made with real cream

  • No artificial colours, flavours or preservatives

description: BORG'S FROZEN ORIGINAL PUFF PASTRY 10 SHEETS 1.7KG
ingredients: Wheat Flour, Water, Margarine [Vegetable Oil, Water, Salt, Emulsifier (471, 472c), Acidity Regulator (330,331), Antioxidant (304,307b), Natural Flavour], Salt
long_description:
Inspired by the flavours of the Mediterranean, Borg's was born in 1960 from a love of cooking and family. It began with traditional pastry snacks, shared and loved by family and friends. Soon, it wasn't just the delicious pastry snacks, but also the flaky homestyle pastry that gained popularity. Borg's is proud and humbled to have been a part of Aussie meals for over 60 years!

 

Our 100% Aussie grown and milled flour is a special, superior quality, high protein flour. This results in a pastry that's smoother, more workable, and versatile so you can trust in the best outcome every time.

 

We work hard to ensure our pastry is as close to home-made as possible, creating light and flaky layers that just melt in your mouth. We actively avoid any nasties so you can be confident our products are better for you. Our pastry has no artificial colours, flavours or preservatives. it also has no trans fat.
  • Trans Fat Free

  • No Artificial Colours, Flavours or preservatives

long_description:
Mixed berries ice-cream. Strawberry ice cream with strawberries. Blueberry ice cream with blueberries.

Commitment issues? The hard part used to be choosing an ice cream flavour, now you just have to decide whether to share me, or have me all to yourself. These adorable ice cream mini cups feature four of my most delectable fruit varieties, so how about we experiment a little? You could discover something extrordinary. So what's my secret? I don't hold back. Using only quality and carefully selected ingredients in my ice cream, every bite of me is proof that when you start with something simple, extraordinary things can happen.

Hagen-Dazs - The ice cream of ice creams

  • Fruit Collection Mini Cup Multipack

  • Made with real cream

  • No artificial colours, flavours or preservatives

  • Kosher and Halal certified

long_description:
Coles Blueberry Sorbet Sticks 280 ml


  • Creamy blueberry sorbet
  • 6 pack
  • No artificial colours and flavours


These Coles Blueberry Sorbet Sticks are a delightfully refreshing way to satisfy sweet cravings. Made with vibrant, zingy blueberries with a smooth and creamy texture, they're a great alternative to ice cream for the hotter months. With their slightly tart blueberry flavour, Coles Blueberry Sorbet Sticks are a little bit different and a lot delicious. Each pack contains 6 individual sorbet sticks so they're great for sharing. they're also free from artificial colours and flavours and made without dairy so they're suitable for vegans and people on dairy-free diets too.


Pick up a pack of Coles Blueberry Sorbet Sticks to keep in your freezer this holiday season. With their sweet blueberry flavour they're popular with all ages and they make an ideal any time snack or dessert to end any good meal, especially on those warm nights and hot summer days.
name: Blueberry Sorbet Sticks

long_description:
Coles Kitchen Cheesy Cauliflower Bites 200g


  • Crisp cauliflower florets
  • Serves 5
  • No artificial colours and flavours


Our Coles Kitchen range is all about making life easier with deliciously simple, home-style food and fresh ingredients. These tasty Coles Kitchen Cheesy Cauliflower Bites are made with florets of cauliflower dusted in cheese powder and coated in a Parmesan flavoured crumb. Perfect for party food, appetisers or as a wholesome snack. With 5 servings they're great for sharing and they're suitable for vegetarians too.


You can bake Coles Kitchen Cheesy Cauliflower Bites from frozen in the oven or air fryer in just 16 minutes until they're crispy and golden brown, ready to devour. Serve with a sprinkling of finely chopped fresh parsley for a delicious side dish or plate them up around a bowl of sweet chilli dip or a good hot sauce for a simple yet tasty party platter.


Coles Kitchen Cheesy Cauliflower Bites not only taste great they're also free from artificial colours and flavours and have a 3.5-star health rating.
name: Cheesy Cauliflower Bites

long_description:
Coles Sweetporium Passionfruit Pavlova Ice Cream l 1 Litre


  • Passionfruit pavlova ice cream
  • With mango and passionfruit ripple
  • No artificial colours and flavours


All the flavours of pavlova, now in an ice cream. This Coles Sweetporium Passionfruit Pavlova Ice Cream will quickly become a family favourite this holiday season. It's made with pavlova flavoured ice cream and loaded with meringue style pieces and swirled with a tropical mango and passionfruit ripple. It's sweet and tangy with all the marshmallowy meringue flavours of the popular summertime pav.


Scooped into waffle cones or straight from the tub, Coles Sweetporium Passionfruit Pavlova Ice Cream is perfect for after dinner, or an afternoon treat. It also makes delicious milkshakes when blended with cold milk and topped with whipped cream. Make sure to chill your drinking glasses in the freezer for 10 minutes before pouring so your milkshakes stay thick for longer.


Coles Sweetporium Passionfruit Pavlova Ice Cream not only tastes great, it's made without artificial colours and flavours.

long_description:
Amazonia Acai Energy Superfood Packs are made from fresh picked Acai Berries wild grown in the Amazon rainforest. Our sustainable program sees thousands of local families hand harvest this berry, providing an incentive to keep these native trees standing.

Our organic Acai is frozen immediately after harvesting, resulting in a deep rich purple colour with 3.5 times the antioxidants of blueberries and Omega's 3, 6 & 9. Amazonia Acai Energy Superfood Packs are the perfect addition to your smoothies, breakfast bowls or can be enjoyed straight from the pack.

"

Coles Bake at Home Mini Cinnamon Swirls 6 Pack. 240g


  • Mini cinnamon pastries
  • Made in Denmark
  • No artificial colours and flavours


Coles Bake at Home Mini Cinnamon Swirls are part of our delicious range of bake at home pastries. "Made in Denmark, these feature a rich caramelised cinnamon filling encased in golden flaky layers of pastry"


Coles Bake at Home Mini Cinnamon Swirls give you all the delicious taste and aroma of cafe quality pastries without leaving home. Just pop them into the oven straight from the freezer and in just 15 minutes they're ready to be served.


they're great to keep on hand for impromptu brunches or weekend breakfasts and they make the ideal companion for coffee breaks and afternoon teas. Coles Bake at Home Mini Cinnamon Swirls are also perfect for the holiday season when guests come to stay. There's nothing like waking up to the smell of freshly baked pastries and hot coffee to make moments feel extra special.

"

description: STREETS GOLDEN GAYTIME PLANT BASED STICKS 4 PACK 400ML
ingredients: Water, vegetable oils, glucose syrup, sugar, wheat flour, cocoa components (1.3%) (cocoa mass, cocoa butter), pea protein, flavour, salt, vegetable gums (412, 410, 407), emulsifiers (471, 322), colours [160b, malt extract (from barley)], raising agent (500).
long_description:
Introducing a new plant-based version of the iconic original Golden Gaytime. This delicious plant based frozen dessert still has the iconic biscuit coating with a toffee-flavoured creamy centre. An Aussie icon, get your hands on a Gaytime Plant Based now. Between World War 1 and World War 2, Edwin ('Ted') Street, with the help of his wife and brother, laid the foundations (in Corrimal, NSW) for what would ultimately become Australia's biggest and best-known ice-cream manufacturer. Streets ice cream was originally made in the back shed by Ted Street. He would then sell these to neighbours along with sweets, cakes and lemonade. Popularity grew and he soon used a cart, then a one horse power motorbike to sell Streets ice cream. It continued to grow and today Streets ice cream is sold throughout Australia and New Zealand with well known brands such as Magnum, Paddle Pop, Cornetto, Gaytime, Calippo and Blue Ribbon. Gaytime was first made in 1959, although it wasn't until 1970 that the Golden Gaytime was released, becoming an Aussie icon in the process!
  • Delicious Plant-Based Treat to statisfy your Gloden Gaytime Ice Cream Cravings!

  • Plant-Based Ice Cream with Toffee-Flavoured a creamy centre

  • Still has the iconic Chocolate coating with Biscuit pieces

  • Vegan Friendly Frozen Treat

  • Coated in a thin layer of chocolate

  • Golden Gaytime, Australia's favourite ice cream!.

long_description:
Coles Sweetporium Black Forest Sticks 380 ml


  • Cherry ripple choc ice cream with choc pieces
  • 4 pack
  • No artificial colours and flavours


Coles Sweetporium Black Forest Sticks are a chocolate lover's dream. Made with choc ice cream and loaded with white choc chips and choc brownie pieces with a swirl of cherry ripple, all covered in a milk chocolate shell, they're a perfect little indulgence to satisfy sweet cravings.


For after dinner or an afternoon sweet treat, Coles Sweetporium Black Forest Sticks are a little bit of decadence made to be savoured. Each pack contains 4 sticks so they're great for sharing and a favourite for all ages.


Coles Sweetporium Black Forest Sticks not only taste great, they're free from artificial colours and flavours.

ingredients: 100% coconut water
long_description:
H2coco Pure Coconut Water is made from sustainably sourced young green coconuts grown in Asia where the sun is hot and the palm trees are plenty! Our deliciously sweet and refreshing coconut water is 100% natural, straight from the coconut, that means no additives, not from concentrate and no added sugar. Coconut water is full of electrolytes & minerals and is renowned for its hydration benefits.

How to enjoy H2coco Pure Coconut Water:
Blend with your morning smoothie
Pour over your favourite breakfast cereal
Pre, post or during your workout
Mix in your cocktail
Make frozen coconut ice blocks
Drink when hungover to replenish electrolytes!

Why H2coco?
Your choice of our healthier drinks is making a positive impact on the environment! H2coco is 100% plastic neutral - for every bottle of H2 purchased, the equivalent of one is removed from ocean-bound waste.
  • 100% natural

  • Not from concentrate

  • No added sugar

  • Naturally gluten-free, fat-free and lactose-free

  • No cholesterol

  • Vegan friendly.

  • The same amount of plastic used in this bottle will be removed from ocean-bound waste.

Made from the juice of young green coconuts, Cocobella coconut water is naturally rich in five key electrolytes making it a great source of hydration and refreshment.

Our 'straight up' range can be enjoyed on it's own as a natural refresher, blended into smoothies or used as an ingredient within delicious recipes. Cocobella makes for an ideal healthy drink packed full of vitamins and minerals.

Pure natural coconut water

Natural hydrating

Rich in 5 key electolytes

No preservatives

Zero fat

For our full range of products & more, visit our website www.purecocobella.com and follow us @purecocobella

ingredients: Coconut Water (79%), Watermelon Juice (10%), Lemon Juice from Concentrate (8%), Cane Sugar, Natural Watermelon and Mint Flavours, Natural Colour from Fruit.
long_description:
Made from the juice of young green coconuts, Cocobella coconut water is naturally rich in five key electrolytes making it a great source of hydration and refreshment.

Our straight up range can be enjoyed on its own as a natural refresher, blended into smoothies or used as an ingredient within delicious recipes. Cocobella makes for an ideal healthy drink packed full of vitamins and minerals.

Made with the water from inside young green coconuts blended with the familiar fruit flavour of delicious watermelon and mint, with a hint of lemon.

Pure natural coconut water
Natural hydrating
Rich in 5 key electolytes
No preservatives
Zero fat

For our full range of products & more, visit our website www.purecocobella.com and follow us @purecocobella
name: Watermelon & Mint Flavour Coconut Water

ingredients: 100% coconut water
long_description:
H2coco Pure Coconut Water is made from sustainably sourced young green coconuts grown in Asia where the sun is hot and the palm trees are plenty! Our deliciously sweet and refreshing coconut water is 100% natural, straight from the coconut, that means no additives, not from concentrate and no added sugar. Coconut water is full of electrolytes & minerals and is renowned for its hydration benefits.

How to enjoy H2coco Pure Coconut Water:
Blend with your morning smoothie
Pour over your favourite breakfast cereal
Pre, post or during your workout
Mix in your cocktail
Make frozen coconut ice blocks
Drink when hungover to replenish electrolytes!

Why H2coco?
Your choice of our healthier drinks is making a positive impact on the environment! H2coco is 100% plastic neutral - for every bottle of H2 purchased, the equivalent of one is removed from ocean-bound waste.
  • 100% natural

  • Not from concentrate

  • No added sugar

  • Naturally gluten-free, fat-free and lactose-free

  • No cholesterol

  • Vegan friendly.

  • This bottle removes its equivalent weight in plastic from ocean-bound waste.

name: Deodorant All Natural Cream Vegan

long_description: Kylie Minogue Signature Rose is beautifully delicate, alluring aromas of fresh summer berries and white blossom.
name: Signature Rose 750ml

long_description:
A light bouquet of red roses intertwined with subtle raspberry notes and fresh citrus aromas. Tasmanian Pepper-leaf and Lemon Myrtle round out the palate reminding the drinker of the Gin's Australian origin.

Botanicals:
Juniper, Orris Root, Lemon Peel, Lavender, Red Rose Petals And Raspberries.

Awards:
  • Bronze Melbourne International Spirits Competition 2022.
  • Gold The Spirits Business Global Gin Masters 2023.
name: Tasmanian Pink Gin 700ml

description: JAMES BUSBY VINEYARD SERIES CABERNET SAUVIGNON 750ML:EA
long_description: Inspired by James Busby, the forefather of Australian wine. Arriving in Australia with vine cuttings in hand, this icon kick-started a world-class wine culture on Australian soil. From the Vineyard Series range comes this cabernet sauvignon; blood plum in colour with cassis and dried herb aromas. The palate is nicely weighted with a medley of blackcurrant, blackberry, mace and dried oregano characters. The powdery tannins and refreshing acidity give the wine a clean and savoury finish. Try this withgrilled meats such as beef or venison.
name: Vineyard Series Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml

description: PUNT ROAD OF LIGHT & SHADOW ROSE 750ML:EA
long_description:
Bright strawberry fruit with notes of vanilla, finishes dry and savoury. OF LIGHT + SHADOWS speaks to the mist that settles around the valley floor, hopefully making way to a brilliant, clear, cool day in Autumn, the traditional ripening time.

Grown and made by Punt Road in Coldstream, on the northern bank of the Yarra River. No finings, minimal filtration, vegan friendly. Bright strawberry fruit. Notes of vanilla, textured (all the pressings in), nice phenolic bite on the finish, fruity mid-palate but finishes dry and savoury.
name: Of Light & Shadow Rose 750ml

long_description:
Dark garnet in colour displaying attractive red fruit aromatics with a pronounced raspberry note showing earthy and gentle spice notes. This is a fresh easy drinking style bottled immediately to capture the essence of the variety. On the palate it's bright with fruit purity showing a good intensity and balanced by cleansing acids. Pair with medium rare steaks and crispy potatoes.

  • Vegan Suitable No Added Preservative.
name: Pf Shiraz 750ml

long_description: A unique blend of three parts of the legendary Kentucky straight Bourbon to one part of top-shelf barrel proof rare breed. Wild Turkey Rare has a deep, smooth bourbon oak character with hints of spice and citrus. At 8% alcohol you get the true taste from the iconic bourbon mixed with cola.
name: Rare & Cola Can 8% 320ml

long_description: A vibrant ruby colour with a bursting palate of red fruits. The notes of cherry and raspberry are complemented with a savoury spice and elegant tannins. Great paired back with pork or roasted vegetables.
name: Grenache 750ml

long_description:
2023 PINOT NOIR
THE WINE
Seductive black cherry overlaid with exotic spices lead to a palate of supple fresh berries, bright acidity and lingering fine grained tannin. The very essence of youthful, vibrant Adelaide Hills Pinot Noir from carefully selected vineyards.

VITICULTURE
With enough sunny days to develop ripe, intense flavours 2023 was a cool and late vintage. The 2023 Epee Pinot Noir is made up of four clones - MV6,777,114 and 115 from vineyards at Gumeracha and Lobethal. More clones equals more complexity.

WINEMAKING
Harvested in the cool of night and early morning, pristine destemmed fruit is tipped directly into fermenters without crushing to give a high percentage of whole berries. The fermenters are gently pumped over twice a day to keep the skins wet and promote gentle tannin extraction. After pressing the wine is kept in stainless steel tanks prior to blending to preserve freshness and vibrancy.
name: Pinot Noir 750ml

long_description: Made from juicy Australian grown pears and not from concentrate, this is a crisp and refreshing cider that would ideally suit an outdoor lunch or dinner. Mr Finch Pear Cider is bright and clear with a sweet, fresh acidity, packed full of the flavours and aromas of Pears. Drink chilled or serve over ice! We recommend having it with a spicy curry such as a fish vindaloo, as the perfect cleanser to that burning palate. Or simply share it with friends on a hot day out in the sun. Easy drinking and tasty put one in your shopping cart today, and then your picnic hamper shortly after. Your friends will be glad you did.
name: Pear Cider Bottle 330ml

long_description: This rich wine opens with a perfumed nose of plum, strawberry fruit and violet scents.The palate is juicy yet savoury with fresh strawberry, plum and raspberry fruits, spice and earthy notes supported by a charry oak finish. The wine is medium bodied with excellent mid-palate weight, silky tannins, and balanced by firm acidity. This is a wine can be enjoyed over the next 2 to 4 years if you can keep your hands off it for that long.
name: Pinot Noir 750ml

long_description: Well balanced and aromatic .  Pale yellow colour with green reflection. Lemony and mineral notes on the nose. Fresh and elegant on the palate with a lovely length. Rich and harmonious finish. Ideal with starters and fish.
name: Chablis 750ml

ingredients: No
long_description: Carlsberg Danish Pilsner is everything you'd expect from the makers of the best beer in the world. It's a uniquely characterful premium pilsner brewed using pilsner malt, a delicate blend of quality hop varieties and yeast, to ensure a consistent, well-balanced taste. It's wonderfully crisp and refreshing, with a rich malty aroma, a fruity hint of hops and a pleasantly smooth bitterness. Skl!
name: Green Bottle 330ml

description: PLUS & MINUS ZERO ALCOHOL BLANC DE BLANCS 750ML:EA
long_description: Plus & Minus Blanc de Blancs is a non-alcoholic sparkling wine perfect for any sober celebration. Bursting with vibrant notes of apple, citrus, and sweetness, you'll feel refreshed and invigorated from just one sip.  Infused with grape seed extract, you'll even get some extra antioxidants. Plus & Minus is a contemporary range of wines developed to be richer in antioxidants, minus the alcohol. These zero alcohol wines have been hand-made without the use of any artificial sweeteners but do see the addition of grape skin extract (GSE) during the winemaking process. This GSE is rich in naturally occurring antioxidants delivering more of those benefits that can already be found in red wine but without the alcohol. The Plus & Minus range of wines have been uniquely hand-crafted using only high-quality grapes from premium, dry-grown South Australian vineyards. This ensures the resultant wines remain vibrant and full flavoured once the process of removing the alcohol has been completed.
name: Zero Alcohol Blanc De Blancs 750ml

description: COLDSTREAM HILLS THE HILLS PINOT GRIS 750ML:EA
long_description: Established by James and Suzanne Halliday in 1985,Coldstream Hills is synonymous with elegance, finesse, greatlength of flavour and the Yarra Valley. Coldstream Hillsprides itself for having access to many of the best vineyardsin the Yarra Valley. These sites are found throughout theupper and lower Yarra Valley with each vineyard providing arange of unique characteristics to the wines.The Hills Pinot Gris has a vibrant, perfumed nose of citrusblossom and nashi pear with hints of musk and whiteflowers. The palate is youthful and balanced, with a finetexture, nuances of mineral slate, and crisp acidity.Youthful and balanced with fine texture and crispcitrus acidity. Vibrant pear and citrus notes areunderpinned by nuances of mineral slate and muskperfume.
name: The Hills Pinot Gris 750ml

long_description: This family-owned Champagne producer has over 200 years of experience ensuring this indulgence is expertly crafted. Delicate, feminine and summery. A refined and elegant, the Grande cuvee Brut Rose is perfect addition to your evening aperitif or soiree. Intense aromas of fresh fruits, predominantly strawberry and raspberry. Slightly rosy hue, beautiful pearl finish, with fine bubbles. Notes of red fruit and subtle spicy aromas. The perfect choice for that special celebration.
name: Brut Rose Nv 750ml

description: DE BORTOLI WINDY PEAK PINOT NOIR 750ML:EA
long_description:
The De Bortoli family philosophy is to produce wine with character, imagination and with a 'sense of place'.

The climate of the Yarra Valley is ideally suited to the production of fine Pinot Noir. Vibrant perfumed Pinot Noir with strawberry and cherry fruit notes; soft gentle spicy flavours with plumpness and juicy acidity. Food suggestion - traditional roast chicken.
name: Windy Peak Pinot Noir 750ml

long_description:
Rounded aromas of ripe mulberry fruit are supported by lifted juniper and citrus. The palate is full and juicy, with initial berry sweetness followed by lingering herbal and peppery complexity.

Mulberries are harvested in October - November for this seasonal treat. Pure cane sugar spirit is infused with juniper for 48 hours, then Riverland orange zest takes a brief dip. The liquor is copper post distilled, retaining the refined ‘heart', before whole mulberries are introduced and steeped for five days. Gently finished with our basket press and a final filter.

Awards:
  • Gold London Wine Competition 2023
  • Gold The Spirit Business Global Gin Masters 2022
  • Gold New York International Spirits Competition 2022.
name: Mulberry Gin 700ml

long_description: Made from Muscat Rouge  Petits Grains, Petit Moscato is a ball of fun and flavour with the perfect balance of bright fruits, soft acidity and spritzy finish.
name: Petit Moscato 750ml

long_description: Created in honour of footy pioneer and the original AFL rule-maker, Thomas Henry Smith, Smithy's consistently kicks goals, delivering clean, uncomplicated beer at a refreshingly good price. A full-strength beer, clean with a delicate hop aroma. Super refreshing with well-balanced bitterness offering you a taste exactly like your favourite beer on tap! Awarded bronze at the AIBA 2021 (Australian International Beer Awards) in the Best Australian Style Lager category, you'd be mad not to give this a try. Get your Smithy's Draught Can 375mL today!
name: Draught Can 375ml

long_description:
Bailey Smith's new premix Barry has just hit our shelves! Barry Crushed Lemon and Watermelon & Lemon premixes are refreshing, low carb and full of flavour. Try them out this weekend!

BARRY is an All-Australian version of a classic Highball Cocktail. Australian distilled Shochu & Vodka are perfectly balanced with real lemon juice to provide a refreshing punch of flavour. At 5.6% alcohol per can or 1.5 Standard drinks BARRY provides a low sugar, low calorie, and low carb option for even the most diligent of drinkers.
name: Crushed Lemon Can 330ml

long_description: Mr Finch premium sparkling rose cider is made from fresh juicy Australian fruit, that is not concentrated meaning it is always naturally crisp and refreshing. Mr Finch Rose Cider is bright and clear with a sweet, fresh acidity, packed full of the flavours and aromas of fresh apples. Drink chilled or serve over ice or it also matches super well with hot curries to put out that burn, or as an aperitif with cheddar cheeses before that next dinner party.
name: Cider Rose Bottle 330ml

description: JAMES BUSBY VINEYARD SERIES BAROSSA VALLEY SHIRAZ 750ML:EA
long_description:
Inspired by James Busby, the forefather of Australian wine. Arriving in Australia with vine cuttings in hand, this icon kick-started a world-class wine culture on Australian soil. This Vineyard Series Barossa Valley Shiaz is deep plum colour with a complex bouquet of dark cherry, blackberries and clove. The palate is structured and balanced with dark fruits and savoury spice. With subtle tannins, the finish is a medley of amaro herbs, black pepper and blood plum.

Awards:
  • Gold Winner International Wine & Spirits Competition Critics Challenge 2023.
name: Vineyard Series Barossa Valley Shiraz 750ml

long_description:
Y Series wines are made to freely express their true self and celebrate the qualities that make them unique.  Just like you. Our Y Series Sangiovese Rose is made from the classic Italian variety Sangiovese. This light, bright, and dry Rose leaps from the glass with pretty floral and berry aromatics.

Crafted for lively, feisty, fancy, or happy moments, there's a Y for every why.

  • Pure expression of the variety.

  • 100% wild yeast fermentation.

  • Exceptional value.
name: Sangiovese Rose 750ml

description: THE BALVENIE 12YO DOUBLEWOOD SINGLE MALT SCOTCH WHISKY 700ML:EA
long_description:
A classic, iconic release, launched in 1993. This whisky has spent 12 years in traditional whisky casks, American oak ex-bourbon barrels and hogsheads. Mellowing the maturing spirit and imparting warming layers of vanilla spiciness. This is then moved to Spanish oak ex-Oloroso sherry casks for an additional nine months to increase complexity, bringing fruity, honeyed depths to the resulting Single Malt. Finally the whisky is then transferred to large oak vessels called tuns for 3-4 months to allow the whiskies to marry the whisky's. This is an excellent introduction to a matured whisky for your collection and would also make the perfect whisky gift for a loved one.

TASTING NOTES: Smooth and mellow with beautifully combined flavours - nutty sweetness, cinnamon spiciness and a delicately proportioned layer of sherry.

SERVING SUGGESTION: Serve neat or with a couple of drops of water (to bring out the flavours).
name: 12yo Doublewood Single Malt Scotch Whisky 700ml

long_description: Just in, Ink Sloe & Berry Gin is an antipodean take on the classic English sloe gin recipe. The base gin was distilled with some of Ink Gin's star players - juniper berry, coriander, angelica and liquorice root. The flavour base continues to build with a tart infusion of sloe berries (actually a fruit) and this tartness is balanced by an explosion of sweet red berries.The final ingredient in Ink Sloe and Berry Gin is Australian rosella flowers. Growing wild on the fringes of tropical rainforest of northern Australia, rosellas are a type of hibiscus flower. They have a vibrant colour and a crisp, tart flavour to balance the sweeter botanicals in Sloe & Berry.
name: Sloe & Berry Gin Liqueur 700ml

description: JAMES BUSBY VINEYARD SERIES TASMANIA PINOT NOIR 750ML:EA
long_description: Winner of the Best Pinot Noir in show at the Royal Adelaide Show 2022, James Busby Vineyard Series is a must try! There is an immediate explosion of dark cherry, blackberry and pomegranate on the nose, followed by elements of spice, toast and earth adding complexity. The palate displays a lush and layered density of fruit with dark cherry and forest berry flavours to the fore. The tannin profile of both bunch and fruit tannins adds drive to the fruit while the bright acidity provides freshness to the palate. James Busby arrived in Australia with vine cuttings that would go on to express the fullest character of the Australian terroir and herald the beginning of a world-class wine culture. Each bottle that bears his name is testament to the brilliance of Australian winemaking and has been handpicked for its exemplary embodiment of the varietal. We invite you to enjoy a drop and raise a glass to the Father of Australian Wine.
name: Vineyard Series Tasmania Pinot Noir 750ml

long_description: Made in Mexico from the finest 100% blue Agave, so you can be sure it's got years of tradition and passion behind it. Its clean crisp flavour makes this Mexican spirit an excellent choice for margaritas and cocktails.The 5th of May 1862 marked the victory of Mexico at the battle of Puebla, Outnumbered and poorly equipped a small Mexican army triumphed over invading French forces. "El Quinto" is inspired by the fighting spirit of Mexico in this iconic battle, which is still celebrated today.
name: Tequila 700ml

long_description: Casa Cinzano, founded in Torino in 1757, wrote an important chapter in cocktail history. Today, Cinzano is enjoyed the world over, thanks to the authentic Italian blending of herbs, spices and wine that give the unique bittersweet flavour. The recipe is secret but the ways to enjoy it are many: Simply with a splash of soda or as an essential in cocktails.
name: Dry Vermouth 1000ml

long_description: Bright ruby in color, busting full of raspberry and red current aromas, with flavors of red cherries and a hint of spice. The wine is smooth and uplifting finish, making it a great partner for pork chops or Middle Eastern dishes.
name: Isabella & Katarina Grenache 750ml

description: ROYAL MONTCOURT GRANDE CUVEE BRUT NV 750ML:EA
long_description: This family owned Champagne producer has over 200 years of experience ensuring this indulgence is expertly crafted. A blend of 50% Pinot Noir, 35% Pinot Meunier and 15% Chardonnay, these carefully selected vineyard parcels express Champagne terroir at its best. Aged for over 15 months this wine is characterised by light toasty notes, a well-balance and elegant finish. Royal Mont court is an outstanding Champagne.
name: Grande Cuvee Brut Nv 750ml

long_description: Second Blooming by Petaluma is a new range of contemporary and minimal preservative wines. Embodied by the beauty of South Australia's native blooms. Vibrant in the glass, displaying all the uplifted nuances of our Limestone Coast vineyards. A perfect reflection of vineyard to glass without much intervention. Naturally fermented Chardonnay with a hint of blush from Pinot Noir, this Pet Nat is perfectly refreshing with beautiful citrus blossom and sherbet nuances.
name: Second Blooming Chardonnay 750ml

long_description: Plus & Minus Zero Alcohol Rose is the kind of rose you can have all day, any day. Best served chilled among friends who love a good time, this alcohol-free rose brings together ripe berries and a hint of earthiness for a truly divine and gentle rose taste. Made with premium red grapes from South Australia, it's non-alcoholic wine that's undeniably delicious. Plus & Minus is a contemporary range of wines developed to be richer in antioxidants, minus the alcohol. These zero alcohol wines have been hand-made without the use of any artificial sweeteners but do see the addition of grape skin extract (GSE) during the winemaking process. This GSE is rich in naturally occurring antioxidants delivering more of those benefits that can already be found in red wine but without the alcohol. The Plus & Minus range of wines have been uniquely hand-crafted using only high-quality grapes from premium, dry-grown South Australian vineyards.
name: Zero Alcohol Rose 750ml

long_description:
El Sueno Tequilas were born from the experience of 5 generations of Agave growers and Tequila makers, as well as the love of the Agave based spirit that two good friends shared. They have been made with only the finest highland and lowland Weber Blue Agave and perfected using traditional batch production methods.

The results are a range of wonderfully smooth, floral yet creamy spirits that are perfect neat, with a mixer of in your favourite cocktail. El Sueno Tequila does not cost the earth - it is affordable, great tasting and sustainable. Optimally rested in oak barrels in Jalisco, Mexico, the resulting Tequila is wonderfully rich and fruity.

AWARDS
  • Silver at the Melbourne International Spirits Competition 2022. Agave/Tequila
  • Bronze at the ISC Tequila 2023
name: Tequila Gold Bottle 700ml

long_description: The Glen Grant 10 Year Old is a multiple award winning Scotch whisky. This elegant single malt dances on the palate with gentle notes of orchard fruits and butterscotch. The finish is satisfyingly long and complex.
name: 10yo Single Malt Scotch 700ml

long_description:
The Glenfiddich 18 Year Old Ancient Reserve is a truly superb single malt aged in Oloroso (Sherry) and Bourbon casks. Then up to 150 of the most exceptional casks are hand-selected by the innovative Malt Master, Brian Kinsman. These casks are then married in small batches in oak tuns for up to three months, to give a remarkably deep, rich and complex flavour.

TASTING NOTES: Baked apple, ripe orchard fruit and dates. Luxurious dried fruit flavours combine with earthy oak, adding depth and complexity.

SERVING SUGGESTION: Enjoy neat to appreciate the full flavour, or for a slightly sweeter taste, add a few drops of water. Complement it with a succulent slice of fruitcake after dinner to enhance the hints of festive spice.
name: 18yo Single Malt Scotch Whisky 700ml

long_description: From the Bellarine Peninsula based Scotchmans Hill comes a refined, yet powerful Chardonnay, with bright, flinty nectarine, citrus and melon fruit. A wine with great complexity and structure and a long lingering finish.
name: Chardonnay 750ml

long_description: French cuvee craft meets German artisanal production: finely beaded Henkell Rose is a refreshing, elegant sparkling wine created from selected red grape varieties.Its distinguished, gently fruity, berry-like flavour is the pinnacle of enjoyment for anyone who appreciates rose with an international, dry character. Henkell Rose's finely arranged, harmonic composition makes for a well-rounded, complete taste experience.
name: Rose Piccolo 200ml

long_description: Grange is arguably Australia's most celebrated wine. Crafted with intensely structured shiraz grapes for an Australian style recognised as one of the world's great wines. With an unbroken line of vintages from the experimental 1951, Grange demonstrates the synergy between shiraz and South Australia.
name: Grange Shiraz 2015 750ml

long_description: Grange is arguably Australia's most celebrated wine. Crafted with intensely structured shiraz grapes for an Australian style recognised as one of the world's great wines. With an unbroken line of vintages from the experimental 1951, Grange demonstrates the synergy between shiraz and South Australia.
name: Grange Shiraz 2016 750ml

long_description: Carlsberg Danish Pilsner is everything you'd expect from the makers of the best beer in the world. It's a uniquely characterful premium pilsner brewed using pilsner malt, a delicate blend of quality hop varieties and yeast, to ensure a consistent, well-balanced taste. It's wonderfully crisp and refreshing, with a rich malty aroma, a fruity hint of hops and a pleasantly smooth bitterness. Skl!
name: Green Bottle 330ml

long_description: Coastal Citrus Gin is all about summer hazy days, from beach to balmy nights, with good company thrown in. Our flavour inspiration comes from the Australian coast and its native pantry. Earthy citrus notes from Lemon Aspen partner with fresh Coriander leaf to give a punchy citrus hit which is offset by the delicate savoury flavours from local Sea Parsley. All of which is rounded out with the classic Juniper backbone. Serve with a premium tonic and garnish with a slice of lemon and sprig of thyme.
name: Coastal Citrus Gin 700ml

long_description: Exhibiting a fine line and subtly-building power on a detail-laden palate, this Pinot Noir is the result of an assemblage of fifteen individual small batches sourced from our Maroondah Highway vineyard. The clonal mix is MV6 (93%) and D2V5 (7%) from our 1994 plantings.
name: Estate Pinot Noir 750ml

description: PLUS & MINUS ZERO ALCOHOL PINOT NOIR 750ML:EA
long_description:
Classic Pinot Noir expression in the glass. The nose displays red fruits as well as a characteristic savoury edge. The palate displays typical Pinot Noir characters of dried herb and spice with a touch of natural fruit sweetness. Pair it with mushroom arancini.

Plus & Minus is a contemporary range of wines developed to be richer in antioxidants, minus the alcohol. These zero alcohol wines have been hand-made without the use of any artificial sweeteners but do see the addition of grape skin extract (GSE) during the winemaking process. This GSE is rich in naturally occurring antioxidants delivering more of those benefits that can already be found in red wine but without the alcohol. The Plus & Minus range of wines have been uniquely hand-crafted using only high-quality grapes from premium, dry-grown South Australian vineyards. This ensures the resultant wines remain vibrant and full flavoured once the process of removing the alcohol has been completed.
name: Zero Alcohol Pinot Noir 750ml

ingredients: Water, malted barley, wheat glucose syrup, sugar, roasted barley, natural flavours, hop extract, hops.
long_description:
A full flavoured classic beer-style with all the refreshment qualities of Carlton, made for occasions when alcohol is not appropriate.
  • Zero Alcohol
name: Zero Bottle 330ml

description: NAPOLEONE & CO YARRA VALLEY APPLE CIDER CAN 355ML:PACK6
long_description:
Napoleone Cider Co. has just released "Louis" - a barrel fermented cider honouring orchard worker Louis Cardinoux who, in 1905, lost an eye working on their renowned property on St Hubert's Rd in Coldstream. This cold-crushed cider was made from a single pick of the 2020 harvest of Yarra Valley apples, steeped on skins for 24 hours, then run to seasoned oak puncheons to naturally ferment. Lees stirring in barrel has lifted the mouth feel and made the French oak aromatics sing. Pretty apple blossom florals and a hint of grapefruit on the nose, it has a crushable off-dry palate with hints of zesty lime. Moreish shortbread notes round out this refreshingly balanced cider.
  • No added sugar.
  • No concentrate, no nonsense.
  • Naturally gluten free and vegan friendly.
name: Yarra Valley Apple Cider Can 355ml

long_description:
Don't fear the pirate! Made right here in Australia, upon opening you will discover an expressive aroma of ripe tropical fruit with a traditional bouquet of spices, vanilla, and caramel. On the palate, you will encounter flavours of honeycomb, clove and cinnamon which provide both complexity and balance. This is the perfect pairing with your favourite cola, slice of lime and loads of crushed ice in a tall glass for those warm sunny days, so put one in your picnic basket today. Enjoy!

Awards:
  • Silver Medal San Francisco World Spirits Competition 2023
  • Gold Medal Melbourne International Spirits Competition 2022.
name: Spiced Gold 700ml

long_description: Think Passiona, Frosty Fruits and tropical fruit punch! With bursts of passion fruit, mango, orange and pineapple it's as refreshing as all those things that have cooled you down in summer for years!Alcoholic bubbly water with bursts of all-natural fruit flavours. Low in calories, carbs, gluten and sugar. Vegan friendly.
name: Fizzer Tropical Crush 330ml

long_description: Casa Cinzano, founded in Torino in 1757, wrote an important chapter in cocktail history. Today, Cinzano is enjoyed the world over, thanks to the authentic Italian blending of herbs, spices and wine that give the unique bittersweet flavour. The recipe is secret but the ways to enjoy it are many: Simply with a splash of soda or as an essential in cocktails.
name: Bianco Vermouth 1000ml

long_description: Jules Taylor was recognised by Gourmet Traveller Wine as their NZ Winemaker of the Year 2021. Jules is one of New Zealand's modern pioneers, producing outstanding wine, who is fiercely proud of her region.We make it our mission to find wines that stand out from the crowd and if you think you've tasted all Marlborough Sauvignon has to offer, then think again. This wine will impress even the most unyielding Savvy cynic.Jules Taylor has been hand-crafting boutique wines in Marlborough since 2001 and we fell head over heels for their unique and expressive style. Intense, with superb fruit, savoury nettle and lifted passionfruit characters. Great length, persistent and complex.
name: Marlborough Sauvignon Blanc 750ml

long_description: Created in honour of footy pioneer and the original AFL rule-maker, Thomas Henry Smith, Smithy's consistently kicks goals, delivering clean, uncomplicated beer at a refreshingly good price. Not only does it's name pay homage to footy's rich history, but its labels reflect the iconic shape of the AFL ground along with the stripes of a classic footy jersey. Can you get anymore Australian than that? A full flavour, full bodied beer that offers you more hops with just the right amount of malt to quench your thirst. Smithy's Bitter is clean, crisp, and balanced making it the perfect company for a footy game or to celebrate the end a working week. Silver World Beer Awards Australia Winner 2021.
name: Bitter Can 375ml

long_description:
El Jimador Reposado Tequila is full of warm, seasoned flavors. This el Jimador Tequila is made with 100% blue Weber agave and is naturally fermented and double distilled. It's then aged for two months in our own charred American white oak barrels. Experience the inviting aroma and flavor of vanilla, toasted wood, fruits and spices with smooth agave followed by a soft, long-lasting finish. Pour this tequila alcohol straight from the tequila bottle to enjoy in a shot, or use it in alcohol drinks such as a classic Margarita, a Tequila Sunrise or an Authentic Paloma cocktail. El Jimador Tequila Reposado has won over 25 awards since 2010 including the silver medal at the 2020 Tequila Mezcal Challenge and a 93-point rating at the 2021 Wine Enthusiast event. Please Drink Responsibly.
  • Tequila liquor with an exquisite golden color and a soft, long-lasting finish

  • Flavors and aromas of vanilla, toasted wood, fruits and spices with smooth agave

  • Made with 100% blue agave, naturally fermented, double distilled and aged for 2 months in charred oak barrels

  • An exceptional choice for sipping straight or as the base for classic alcohol drinks and other festive cocktails

  • Winner of the silver medal at the 2020 Tequila Mezcal Challenge and a 93-point rating at the 2021 Wine Enthusiast event
name: Reposado Tequila 700ml

description: AERSTONE LAND CASK 10YO SINGLE MALT SCOTCH 700ML:EA
long_description:
A rich and smoky single malt, Aestone Land Cask is matured in warehouses located further inland. It has a well balanced sweet character opening with burnt brown sugar, aniseed, and salted honeycomb quickly giving way to briny olive tones and hints of citrus and smoked meats.

This bottle is one of two distinctive styles in the Aerstone's range - Rich & Smoky - their taste profile clearly defined on the bottle and pack.

TASTING NOTES: Serve neat or with a couple of drops of water (to bring out the flavours).

SERVING SUGGESTION: Serve neat or with a couple of drops of water (to bring out the flavours).
name: Land Cask 10yo Single Malt Scotch 700ml

long_description:
Tasmanian- made copper pot still Bramble Gin with key notes of juniper, lemon, and subtle spice throughout. A generous berry compote sweetness that rolls along the palate is elevated by ever-present subtle floral notes. A must try for the gin devotee.

Awards:
  • Silver San Francisco World Spirits Competition 2022.
  • Silver The Spirits Business Global Gin Masters 2023.
  • Bronze Melbourne International Spirits Competion 2022.
name: Tasmanian Bramble Gin 700ml

long_description: Elegant and mellow, well structured with underlying power and strength. Smooth with rich soy sauce notes, fresh nuts, hints of sweet notes from rock melon, apricot and green apple, intertwined with floral notes like jasmine and vanilla
name: Chun 1992 Baijiu 500ml

long_description: This classic Mornington Peninsula Chardonnay has aromas of white peaches, lemon zest and subtle toasty oak. It has a taut, refreshing acid structure with layers of flavours that produce an elegant long concentrated finish. Great purity of flavour is found in the crisp stone fruit, grapefruit and floral notes, with weight and texture added from the quality oak. Complex mix of flinty and toasty elements on the nose and a big delicious old school style of palate. Overall this is one smart package that's bound to lure you in - and keep you coming back for more.
name: Chardonnay 750ml

long_description: As a classic liqueur, Frangelico delights the senses prepared in any way. Its dark appearance is always ready to surprise with a sweet golden taste. FRANGELICO is Crafted with wild Tonda Gentile hazelnuts, a speciality of the Piedmont region of northern Italy. Frangelico contains no artificial colours or flavours and is blended with coffee, cocoa and vanilla distillate and extracts. The Iconic bottle in the shape of a friar conveys the centuries of Italian tradition behind the brand.
name: Hazelnut Liqueur 700ml

long_description:
The richly layered Glenfiddich 15 Year Old single malt Scotch whisky is innovatively matured in three types of oak cask: sherry, bourbon and new oak, before being married in thier unique, handcrafted Oregon pine Solera vat. Year on year, this Solera vat is never emptied but is always kept at least half full creating a deliciously harmonious and intense whisky which gets more complex and intriguing every year.

TASTING NOTES: Silky smooth, revealing layers of sherry oak, marzipan, cinnamon and ginger. Full-bodied and bursting with flavour.

SERVING SUGGESTION: Serve neat, with a couple of drops of water (to bring out the flavours), or over ice.
name: 15yo Single Malt Scotch Whisky 700ml

long_description:
This non-alcoholic sparkling wine is everything you'd expect from one of France's oldest wine houses. Barton & Guestier follow traditional winemaking rules to produce this French gem, removing the alcohol using a unique craft filtration technique.

The result is a sophisticated, refreshing, sparkling wine - the perfect non-alcoholic alternative to an Italian Prosecco or a French Champagne. This vegan sparkling wine is a pale golden colour with fine, long-lasting bubbles. The nose is intense and aromatic, combining delicate floral and fruity flavours.
name: Ultra Low Alcohol 750ml

long_description: Wild Turkey and Cola has a new and improved recipe. Its blend has been carefully adjusted to retain the quality Wild Turkey flavour loved by bourbon drinkers. There proud to say it was ranked No.1 by Bourbon pre-mix drinkers as the preferred overall choice of drink. Served chilled or on the rocks, its sweet vanilla notes combine with earthy characters to give it a refreshing body and smooth finish.
name: & Cola Can 375ml

long_description:
James Busby arrived in Australia with vine cuttings that would go on to express the fullest character of the Australian terroir and herald the beginning of a world-class wine culture. Each bottle that bears his name is testament to the brilliance of Australian winemaking and has been handpicked for its exemplary embodiment of the varietal. We invite you to enjoy a drop and raise a glass to the Father of Australian Wine.

A region synonymous for Chardonnay, this wine displays aromas of white peach, lemon and nougat with delicate and enticing savoury notes. The palate is gently weighted with a lovely volume and intensity with flavours of stone fruit, citrus, crème fraiche and baking spice. The refreshing acidity along with the mineral saline and flint notes add to the wine's long and pure finish.
name: Yarra Valley Chardonnay 750ml

description: MR FINCH APPLE LOWER SUGAR CIDER BOTTLE 330ML:CTN24
long_description: Same great taste as Mr Finch's other range of apple, pear and rose ciders, but with 50% less sugar than regular cider. Made from juicy Australian grown apples and not from concentrate, this is a crisp and refreshing cider that would be great with an outdoor lunch or dinner. We recommend having it with a spicy curry such as a chicken vindaloo, as the perfect cleanser to that burning tongue. Or simply share it with friends on a hot day out in the sun.
name: Apple Lower Sugar Cider Bottle 330ml

long_description: Ideal for cocktails, our signature blend turns a classic daiquiri into delightful Jamaican daiquiri. Fruit-forward aromas with notes of dried apricots, fresh peach and hints of molasses.
name: Signature Blend Rum 700ml

long_description: The nose displays varietal hits of Shiraz characterised by black fruits, hints of chocolate and vanilla with subtle oak hints. The palate delivers vibrant dark fruits, a touch of sweet fruit and a thin weave of tannins before ending with medium concentration. Pair it with a steak sandwich. Plus & Minus is a contemporary range of wines developed to be richer in antioxidants, minus the alcohol. These zero alcohol wines have been hand-made without the use of any artificial sweeteners but do see the addition of grape skin extract (GSE) during the winemaking process. This GSE is rich in naturally occurring antioxidants delivering more of those benefits that can already be found in red wine but without the alcohol. The Plus & Minus range of wines have been uniquely hand-crafted using only high-quality grapes from premium, dry-grown South Australian vineyards. This ensures the resultant wines remain vibrant and full flavoured once the process of removing the alcohol has been completed.
name: Zero Alcohol Shiraz 750ml

long_description: Bright cherry and raspberry fruit aromas to the fore with background hints of rosemary, lavender, rose petal and dark chocolate sitting above an underlying steely note. An intense entry onto the palate with fruit-forward red cherry, plum and rhubarb flavour. Not at all a shy Pinot Noir, yet it is still well-framed, poised and structured with weighty fruit emboldened by a base of firm tannins and fine acidity.
name: Pinot Noir 750ml

long_description: The Nobility of Cognac combined with the Bitter essence of Orange to create a liqueur that has captivated the world for over six generations since 1827. The powerful and complex aromas and flavours of Cordon Rouge are perfect for grand cocktails. Add a level of sophistication to your cocktails such as The Grand Margarita, The Grand Old Fashioned or The Grand Mai-Tai.
name: Liqueur 500ml

description: THE BALVENIE 14YO CARIBBEAN CASK SINGLE MALT WHISKY 700ML:EA
long_description:
Balvenie Caribbean Cask was created by The Balvenie Malt Master, David Stewart, who celebrated an incredible 50th anniversary at the distillery in 2012. 14 years maturation in traditional oak casks & finished in Caribbean rum casks.

TASTING NOTES: Rounded with vanilla, toffee, nutmeg and sweet oak notes, with a fruity character that develops with time.

SERVING SUGGESTION: Serve neat or with a couple of drops of water (to bring out the flavours).
name: 14yo Caribbean Cask Single Malt Whisky 700ml
King Valley Pinot Grigio 750ml
description: JAMES BUSBY KING VALLEY PINOT GRIGIO 750ML:EA
long_description:
The wine has a vibrant lemon colour with bright aromas of apple, lemon, and green almond. There is a lovely texture and a great liveliness on the palate. The finish is vivid and refreshing with notes of preserved lemon, crunchy pear and almond blossom. This versatile wine is proving to be a popular choice for any occasion.Try this wine with olive oil and garlic spaghetti with artichoke, Kalamata olives, goats' cheese and fresh chilli.

James Busby arrived in Australia with vine cuttings that would go on to express the fullest character of the Australian terroir and herald the beginning of a world-class wine culture. Each bottle that bears his name is testament to the brilliance of Australian winemaking and has been handpicked for its exemplary embodiment of the varietal. We invite you to enjoy a drop and raise a glass to the Father of Australian wine.

Awards:
  • Bronze Medal Victorian Wine Show 2022.

name: Chardonnay 750ml
long_description: Sourced from hillside sloping vineyards in the Lower and Upper Yarra Valley, the grapes are pressed using gentle handling techniques. Coldstream Hills Chardonnay is barrel fermented and matured in French oak barrels for up to nine months prior to blending and bottling. The Upper Yarra Chardonnay generally provides attractive citrus characters, with mineral slate notes and length; the Lower Yarra is often fleshier in style with attractive white peach and quince characters. Blending of parcels from both regions results in wines of complexity, varietal definition, and length.

name: Longbranch Kentucky Bourbon Whiskey 700ml
description: WILD TURKEY LONGBRANCH KENTUCKY BOURBON WHISKEY 700ML:EA
long_description: Refined with Texas mesquite and oak charcoals, the 8-year-old Kentucky Straight Bourbon goes down smooth. It has a sweet vanilla flavor balanced by a slight smokiness, which are present whether you're sipping it neat, on the rocks, or in a mixed drink.

name: & Cola 101 Can 375ml
long_description: Wild Turkey 101 Premium Blend & Cola is best served icy cold or on the rocks. Wild Turkey 101 Premium combines sweet vanilla notes with bold earthy characters to give it a refreshing body and smooth finish. Its perfectly aged bourbon flavours carry through with a higher proof.

name: Are You Game Shiraz 750ml
long_description:
Are you Game? are a collection of high-altitude Victorian wines crafted by Fowles to match with the texture and flavours of real food sourced from the land. Intensely aromatic, fine in texture and wildly delicious, Are you Game? wines are blended with a dash of another varietal to add complexity and encourage discovery in food and wine.
  • Intensely aromatic

  • Fine in texture

  • Crafted to complement the textures and flavours of wild food

  • Unique labelling

name: Apple Cider Bottle 330ml
long_description:
Made from juicy Australian apples. A bright crunchy apple acidity is balanced with a delicate sweetness, hints of toffee and a fresh lively finish. Drink chilled or try over ice!

Long, long ago when apples were a luxury enjoyed within the gilded village walls of the wealthy, a magical stag named Mr Finch decided to put matters to right. The fantastical stag sprouted the most bountiful orchard ever seen and gifted the produce to the people. Mr Finch stood tirelessly guarding the orchard day and night to ensure an abundant supply of juicy apples for everyone to enjoy.

name: Silver Tequila 200ml
long_description: Amazingly smooth and floral. El Sueno Tequila Silver is made from the finest Agave (70%) and a natural Mexican cane sugar, Piloncillo (30%). With sustainability at its core, Tequila Silver delivers a delightfully floral and citrussy finish. Super smooth to sip by itself or mix with premium tonic water for a refreshing T&T. Makes a great classic Margarita. Tasting Notes: Citrus, Cucumber and Pepper. Suitable for vegan lifestyles. Gluten-free. Eco-conscious sustainable production process

name: Signature Gin 200ml
long_description: This stunning looking Gin bottle is backed up by a host of international awards including Double Gold medals at the recent San Francisco World Spirits Competition 2017.The 23rd Street distiller individually infuses ten botanicals including traditional juniper and coriander, complemented by zesty local citrus. Careful blending is key, creating a layered palate and full-bodied mouthfeel. (200ml size bottle)

name: The Hills Chardonnay 750ml
long_description: The Hills Chardonnay has attractive notes of honeydew melon, white peach and white flowers. The palate is fine and balanced with juicy grape acidity, delicious stone-fruit flavours, texture and length.

name: Sea Cask 10yo Single Malt Scotch 700ml
description: AERSTONE SEA CASK 10YO SINGLE MALT SCOTCH 700ML:EA
long_description:
Aerstone Sea Cask is so-called because some of our warehouses are situated right by the sea exposed to the cooler sea air and perched on the intense environs of the Ayrshire coast, of Scotland. This impacts the 10-year maturation process and delivers a smooth whisky with a hint of sea salt.

This bottle is one of two distinctive styles in the Aerstone's range - Smooth & Easy - their taste profile clearly defined on the bottle and pack.

TASTING NOTES: Lightly-toasted almonds, sweet cotton candy and a gentle vanilla oak, balanced with a touch of tannin.

SERVING SUGGESTION: Serve neat or with a couple of drops of water (to bring out the flavours).

name: Ipa 7% Can 375ml
long_description: A modern Australian craft beer with an old school name we all know and love. Brewed in Victoria from the finest Australian hops, Tinnies has something to suit every palate. Now this IPA (Indian pale ale) is one hop rollercoaster with huge aromas of citrus, pine and melon. With some serious bitterness and intense hop character, this brew is not for the faint hearted. Made in Victoria with the finest Australian hops, this beer is made for a big hearty burger, maybe even one with a bit of a spicy edge.

name: Yarra Valley Apple Cider Can 355ml
description: NAPOLEONE & CO YARRA VALLEY APPLE CIDER CAN 355ML:CTN24
long_description:
Crushed from a single pick of our 2021 harvest of Yarra Valley apples, steeped on skins for 24 hours, then plunged head-first to seasoned barrels to naturally ferment.

This brew is more savory than its bottled stablemates, thanks to regular lees stirring, lending mouthfeel and complexity.

In a nutshell, the Louis Hard Cider delivers a thirst quenching, cool-climate fruit flavor, with the funk and texture that comes from 30 years of hard graft in the Yarra.

name: Shiraz 750ml
long_description: James Busby arrived in Australia with vine cuttings that would go on to express the fullest character of the Australian terroir and herald the beginning of a world-class wine culture. Each bottle that bears his name is testament to the brilliance of Australian winemaking and has been handpicked for its exemplary embodiment of the varietal. We invite you to enjoy a drop and raise a glass to the Father of Australian Wine. Deep ruby in colour with a fragrant bouquet of blueberries, vanilla and spice. Juicy flavours of plum with notes of chocolate coated coffee beans, black pepper and a hint of earthy truffles.

name: Piccolo Sparkling Pinot Noir 200ml
description: BIRD IN HAND PICCOLO SPARKLING PINOT NOIR 200ML:EA
long_description:
A delicate sparkling, pearl pink in colour, with floral notes and hints of fresh strawberry and citrus blossom on the nose. Its lively palate evokes flavours of fleshy red berry fruits with a delicate bead, leading to a refreshing, clean finish.

The perfect pre-dinner aperitif or celebratory drink. Enjoy chilled and whilst young.

name: Act Two Dry Pinot Rose 750ml
description: LA BOHEME ACT TWO DRY PINOT ROSE 750ML:EA
long_description:
La Bohème Dry Rose is a classic bistro wine - ethereal, aromatic, textural, sophisticated and so easy to pair with food.
  • Vegan Friendly

name: Aperitif 700ml
long_description: Campari is the perfect Italian aperitif with its distinctive dark red colour, aroma and pleasantly bittersweet flavour. Enjoy Campari mixed with grapefruit juice, ginger lemonade or soda over ice.Campari Orange Ice Sphere Cocktail30ml Campari30ml blood orange juice60ml spring water- Put the orange juice, water and Campari into an ice sphere mould or use an over-sized ice cube tray and freeze. Shake the gin, apple and lemon juice and sugar syrup with ice. Put the mint into a glass, then the Campari sphere, and strain the gin mix over.

name: Cider Rose Bottle 330ml
long_description: Full of bright floral notes with hints of fresh apples and pink spring blossom, this sparkling rose cider is a great beverage for all occasions. Made from juicy Australian grown apples and not from concentrate, this is a crisp and refreshing cider that would be great with an outdoor lunch or dinner. We recommend having it with a spicy curry such as a chicken vindaloo, as the perfect cleanser to that burning tongue. Or simply share it with friends on a hot day out in the sun.

name: Shiraz 750ml
long_description:
Often referred to as the classic Australian red wine, [yellow tail] shiraz is an easy to drink, all-time favourite
  • The Casella family has been crafting wines for generations; the samefamily traditions and passion carry on today through [yellow tail].

  • Great tasting Australian wine that brings a smile to everyone's lips!

name: Tequila Blanco 700ml
long_description: This Mexican Tequila is handcrafted from 100% pure blue agave, Espolon Blanco premium celebrates real Mexico and its storied culture through classic 19th century artistry and the iconic rooster, a symbol of national pride. Crafted at the acclaimed San Nicolas distillery in the Los Altos region of Jalisco Espolon Blanco is medium-full bodied with rich roasted agave, tropical fruit flavours with a long, spicy finish.

name: Lima Quinta De Bons Ventos 750ml
description: CASA SANTOS LIMA QUINTA DE BONS VENTOS 750ML:EA
long_description:
Blending indigenous Portuguese varieties to create an aromatic blend of ripe red fruits and licorice, with a peppery finish. The perfect dry red to have at the ready for summer barbeques.

'You will be a star, for little money, if you take this to a dinner party. A blend of four indigenous Portuguese varieties, this has cherries and chocolate flavours that have a savoury edge and a gentle finish.' - Jeff Collerson, Daily Telegraph.

name: Spr Rosso Sweet Vermouth 1000ml
long_description: Cinzano Rosso was born in Turin and is known throughout the world,with its amber colour thanks to its rich infusion of herbs and spices of prestige and quality. It is the perfect ingredient for cocktails thanks to its delicate yet persistent and characteristic aftertaste.It can be served straight or with a splash of soda.

name: French Brandy 1l
long_description: Sainte Louise Napoleon French Brandy is now available in this versatile 1 Litre sized bottle. A blend of French grape brandies which have matured in oak casks until reaching bottling age. Beautiful aroma, full bodied and smooth. Enjoy neat or with your favourite mixer.

name: Adelaide Hills Pinot Gris 750ml
description: TWO TOWNS ADELAIDE HILLS PINOT GRIS 750ML:EA
long_description: The wine has great length, is expressive and has excellent purity. Fresh peachy, fruit and weight on the palate. Pairs perfectly with BBQ fish, grilled chicken salad and pork fillet with cream sauce.

name: Revolution Pinot Noir 750ml
description: CHILDREN OF THE REVOLUTION PINOT NOIR 750ML:EA
long_description: Children of the Revolution has been hand-crafted for a new generation of wine lovers. The wines are sourced from premium South Australian vineyards to produce soft, fruit-driven wines that are full of fresh, bright fruit flavours whilst being medium bodied, naturally lighter in alcohol and vegan friendly. This Pinot Noir displays black cherry, strawberry, liquorice and brown spice characters that are light in feel but energetic and long in flavour. Soft integrated tannins provide structure whilst a bright acidity drives the fresh finish. Great on its own, or well matched with a mushroom pasta.

name: Aoc Luberon Rose 750ml
long_description: Vines have flourished in the Luberon in France for hundreds of years with the grapes benefiting from the warmth of the Mediterranean climate whilst retaining a lovely fresh finish. A wonderful crisp and fruity Rose with notes of wild strawberries and fresh cherries. Perfect as an aperitif or as a partner to fish and shellfish, chicken dishes and salads.

name: Apple Cider Bottle 330ml
long_description:
Made from juicy Australian apples. A bright crunchy apple acidity is balanced with a delicate sweetness, hints of toffee and a fresh lively finish. Drink chilled or try over ice!

Long, long ago when apples were a luxury enjoyed within the gilded village walls of the wealthy, a magical stag named Mr Finch decided to put matters to right. The fantastical stag sprouted the most bountiful orchard ever seen and gifted the produce to the people. Mr Finch stood tirelessly guarding the orchard day and night to ensure an abundant supply of juicy apples for everyone to enjoy.

name: Prosecco Doc 750ml
long_description: Typical Italian Prosecco Spumante, crisp and delicate perlage. Pale light yellow colour, delicate and complex bouquet with fruity notes that remind of peach, green apple with second notes of acacia and lilac. Fresh and light on the palate, with balanced acidity and body; harmonic with a long persistent aftertaste.

name: Dry Lager Bottle 330ml
long_description: Created in honour of footy pioneer and the original AFL rule-maker, Thomas Henry Smith, Smithy's consistently kicks goals, delivering clean, uncomplicated beer at a refreshingly good price. Not only does it's name pay homage to footy's rich history, but its labels reflect the iconic shape of the AFL ground along with the stripes of a classic footy jumper. Can you get anymore Australian than that? Refreshing full strength lager with a smooth and dry finish. Smithy's Dry has 50% less carbs than a standard lager due to its unique brewing process that actively reduces the amount of available sugar. Full on flavour, low on carbs! And it's not just us that thinks this is a winner - this dry lager was awarded Gold in the World Beer Awards Australia 2021.

name: Semillon Sauvignon Blanc 750ml
long_description: Hidden Gem Semillon Sauvignon Blanc is a refreshing blend that puts on full displays flavours of zesty lemon and gooseberry flavours with a clean, crisp finish. A great drop for any occasion. Awarded the Gold Medal at the Riverina Wine Show 2023.

name: Rose 750ml
long_description: Delicate rose gold in colour, this wine is filled with aromas of strawberries and cherries with floral and tropical undertones. The palate displays fresh strawberries and cream and subtle cherry flavours with a bright and refreshing finish.

name: Prosecco 750ml
long_description: De Bortoli Prosecco is easy to drink, lively and fun. Great on its own or shared with food. For a spritz with a twist, mix with Aperol and soda.

name: Pinot Noir Cask 2l
description: THE STUBBORN FEW PINOT NOIR CASK 2L:EA
long_description: This is a celebration of 'The Stubborn Few' - A minority who, threw caution to the wind and forged the way for modern Australian wine making. One of them defied preconceptions and invented wine cask, breaking the rules just to keep his wine fresh. A box makes perfect sense. It's airtight, economical and environmentally friendly. The Stubborn Few Pinot Noir is aromatic and has soft generous flavours of luscious red berries and lingering finish. Matches harmoniously with a creamy pasta dish. So kick back and raise a glass to thinking outside of the box.

name: Premium Lager Bottle 330ml
long_description: The Smithy's Premium only used the finest ingredients, creating a refreshing lager that is the perfect balance between malt and hop aromas with exiting subtle fruity finish. Smithy's Premium Lager Beer is named after one of the pioneers of footy, Thomas Henry Smith, who was part of the group of men responsible for drafting the first Rules of Australian Football. Smithy's is a clean, crisp, refreshing lager brewed in Victoria using local ingredients. The result is a stellar beer, perfect for any occasion.

name: Prosecco Doc 200ml
long_description: Typical crisp and  delicate perlage. Pale light yellow colour, delicate and complex bouquet with fruity notes that remind of peach, green apple with second notes of acacia and lilac.Fresh and light on the palate, with balanced acidity and body; harmonic with a long persistent aftertaste.

name: French Brandy 700ml
long_description: Sainte Louise Napoleon is a blend of French grape brandies which have matured in oak casks until reaching bottling age. Beautiful aroma, full bodied and smooth. Enjoy neat or with your favourite mixer. - Silver Medal   2020 San Francisco World Spirits Competition.

name: Champagne Nv 750ml
long_description: Henri Laurent Champagne is rich in character and texture and beaming with brioche, dried apricot and honeyed notes, there's exquisitely balanced acid for a fresh, drying finish. This label offers remarkable value for non-Vintage Champagne!

name: Barossa Shiraz 750ml
long_description:
Two Towns wines are made from the finest grapes from one of South Australia's finest wine regions - the Barossa Valley. This wine celebrates the iconic wine region and their landscape. Delicious, integrated toasty oak. Yummy dark berry flavours, velvet tannins and good persistence.

Awards:
  • Bronze Medal Royal Adelaide Wine Show 2022.

name: Draught Rack Pack Bottle 750ml
long_description:
Carlton has been delivering that Brewery Fresh taste for over 150 years. It's the same smooth, full-bodied taste you enjoy straight from the tap at your favourite pub. Carlton Draught delivers an uncomplicated beer, with broad taste appeal typical of a classic Australian lager style beer.

Estd. 1864

name: Adelaide Hills Pinot Noir 750ml
description: TWO TOWNS ADELAIDE HILLS PINOT NOIR 750ML:EA
long_description: A wonderfully vibrant Pinot Noir with aromas of red plums, rose and cocoa. The palate is bursting with strawberry, red cherries, and delicate vanilla spice. The elegant tannins provide a lovely savoury character to complement the long finish.

name: Semillon Sauvignon Blanc 750ml
long_description:
Semillon Sauvignon Blanc is a classic white blend which is bright, fresh and easy to drink. It is beautiful enjoyed on a warm summer's day. 
  • The Casella family has been crafting wines for generations; the samefamily traditions and passion carry on today through [yellow tail].

  • Great tasting Australian wine that brings a smile to everyone's lips!

name: Terre De Providence Rose 750ml
long_description: Bijou is a small producer from the South of France. Their focus has always been to make truly authentic wines that are delicious, elegant and reflect the local terroir on which the grapes are grown. This delicate rose has wonderful aromas of bright berry fruit, floral honeysuckle and citrus, with a light, crisp and fresh palate. It is a full-flavoured rose and has a silky, smooth finish. The Bijou Terre de Providence Rose is ideal with cured meats such as salami and prosciutto, as well as soft cheeses. Enjoy chilled, we recommend it served as a pre-dinner aperitif, so buy one before that next dinner party and your guests will be glad you did.

name: Dry Lager Bottle 330ml
long_description: Created in honour of footy pioneer and the original AFL rule-maker, Thomas Henry Smith, Smithy's consistently kicks goals, delivering clean, uncomplicated beer at a refreshingly good price. Not only does it's name pay homage to footy's rich history, but its labels reflect the iconic shape of the AFL ground along with the stripes of a classic footy jumper. Can you get anymore Australian than that? Refreshing full strength lager with a smooth and dry finish. Smithy's Dry has 50% less carbs than a standard lager due to its unique brewing process that actively reduces the amount of available sugar. Full on flavour, low on carbs! And it's not just us that thinks this is a winner - this dry lager was awarded Gold in the World Beer Awards Australia 2021. Awards: Silver - 1A Best Australian Style Lager AIBA 2021. Bronze - World Beer Awards Australia 2022.

name: Ultra Low Carb Bottle 330ml
description: BRITE BLONDE ULTRA LOW CARB BOTTLE 330ML:CTN24
long_description: Light and fruity aroma with hints of fresh green hops and malt leading to a flavoursome yet refreshing taste, and a crisp and light finish. With 80% less carbs than regular beer, this premium lager is perfect for those who want to balance a healthy and social lifestyle, but still want a brew that's full of flavour. It's a great choice for a casual get together with friends or a picnic on the beach. Drink it with beer battered fish and chips.

name: Pinot Gris Cask 2l
description: THE STUBBORN FEW PINOT GRIS CASK 2L:EA
long_description: This is a celebration of 'The Stubborn Few' - A minority who, threw caution to the wind and forged the way for modern Australian wine making. One of them defied preconceptions and invented wine cask, breaking the rules just to keep his wine fresh. A box makes perfect sense. It's airtight, economical and environmentally friendly. The Stubborn Few Pinot Gris is delicious ripe, peachy, pear fruit a soft palate kept refreshed by lively lemon zestiness. So kick back and raise a glass to thinking outside of the box.

name: Gold Block Can 375ml
long_description:
A refreshing, thirst quenching, mid-strength lager that is full of flavour,

with a well-balanced dry crisp finish. Smithy's Easy Drinking Beer is named after one of the pioneers of footy, Thomas Henry Smith, who was part of the group of men responsible for drafting the first Rules of Australian Football. Smithy's is a clean, crisp, refreshing lager that is perfect for any occasion.

name: Pf Pinot Noir 750ml
long_description:
Light in colour, this is a soft Pinot Noir with raspberry, cherry, mixed spices, and a subtle earthy note. There's real Pinot Noir character evident making it very flavoursome and moreish. Dark fruited with soft tannins and perfect on its own or with food, particularly less gamey type meats and spring vegetables.

  • Vegan Suitable No Added Preservative.

name: 12yo Single Malt Scotch Whisky 700ml
long_description:
The Glenfiddich 12 Year Old bears all the hallmarks of our Speyside signature style, one that has made us the world's most awarded single malt. Pioneering the single malt category, the whisky is matured in the finest Oloroso sherry and bourbon casks for at least 12 years before being uniquely married in oak tuns for up to nine months to develop exceptional harmony and complexity of flavour.

TASTING NOTES: A distinctive fresh and fruity nose with a hint of pear followed by a palate of butterscotch, cream, malt and a subtle oak.

SERVING SUGGESTION:
Serve neat, with water (to bring out the flavours), over ice or in cocktails.

name: Marlborough Sauvignon Blanc 750ml
long_description:
